description_long: This is a small, charming house with a steep gable roof covered in hexagonal gray shingles and a prominent front porch. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal green siding, accented by white trim and decorative scalloped edging around the windows and roofline. The front features a centered door flanked by two windows, each with white shutters, and the porch is supported by white posts with cross-braced railings. The side and rear elevations have additional windows with ornate trim, while the back wall is solid with no openings. The house sits on a wooden platform, and a small chimney protrudes from the roof. The overall design is quaint and inviting, reminiscent of a storybook cottage or Victorian-inspired playhouse.
description: A quaint green house with a steep gable roof, white trim, and a welcoming front porch with decorative railings and shutters.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two shuttered windows, and the full porch with white posts and railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large window with ornate trim and the depth of the porch, as well as the roof's chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid green wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the house's compact shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and a clear view of the porch's side entrance and railing details.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with decorative trim and shutters
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a covered porch, white posts, cross-braced railings, and scalloped trim
